name: smartg
summary: SMART-G (Speed-up Monte Carlo Advanced Radiative Transfer Code using GPU) is a radiative transfer code using a Monte-Carlo technique to simulate the propagation of the polarized light in the atmosphere and/or ocean, and using GPU acceleration.
author_email: Mustapha Moulana <mm@hygeos.com>, Didier Ramon <dr@hygeos.com>, François Steinmetz <fs@hygeos.com>, Dominique Jolivet <dj@hygeos.com>, Mathieu Compiègne <mc@hygeos.com>
